feed.description: Photography conversations: craft, storytelling, workflow, and making images under real constraints.
feed.title: Frame & Light

bullets:
# Frame & Light — Episode
## Documentary Workflow in the Field
Host: Leo
Guest: Tariq
Leo: Welcome back to Frame & Light.
Today we’re talking about documentary workflow in the field, and I’m joined by Tariq.
I’m excited—this is a topic people care about, and there’s a lot of practical nuance.
